items.name_en: Genuine Grade
items.name_cn:
Genuine Grade
【Bvlgari】Bvlgari Serpenti Forever Wrist Clutch, Counter Hot Style. Original Quality, Imported South African Leather + Custom Original Hardware. 🎉🎉 Adorned with Serpenti black and white enamel and light gold-plated snake head clasp, inlaid with emerald green turquoise eyes, with detachable shoulder strap 🎀. Three-compartment interior for a simple and practical design to meet your different needs. Includes raincoat, mirror, counter gift box packaging, laser anti-counterfeit tag and printed unique code. Model: 38329, Dimensions: 18*16*9cm

items.name_cn:
Genuine Grade
CELIN.E 23 New Ava TRIOMPHE Calfskin Handbag
This time Ava adds a metal Triomphe logo buckle, making it more exquisite and beautiful 💓~ Soft calfskin and crescent moon appearance 🌙 Full texture, comes with retro fashion sense. Magnetic C-closure Triomphe flap design, interpreting French retro romance. The whole bag is lightweight yet structured 💯 Daily versatile and commuter ready ✨
Calfskin, calfskin lining, shoulder and handheld, zip closure, leather flap, full steel TRIOMPHE magnetic clasp, 1 interior flat pocket, adjustable shoulder strap, min length 22cm, max length 23cm
Size: 23 X 13.5 X 6cm
No.: 114492BZJ.04LU

items.name_en: Genuine Grade Original Factory Leather Version
items.name_cn:
Genuine Grade Original Factory Leather Version
Tote Latest Qixi Limited Series, sweet Qixi, exclusive romantic styling, too attractive for girls. The white body is embellished with handwritten French letters and small red hearts, super gentle and sweet, helping you freeze the moment of love. Exquisite embroidery paired with creamy white cowhide, sweet yet elegant. The bag comes with an adjustable long shoulder strap, retaining the simplicity of the bag shape while offering the large capacity of a tote. It can be carried by hand or worn diagonally, fully meeting daily travel needs.
size:26*12*21cm
